detail.title: Maximum Calories Burnt from Jumps
hints: Sort heights and greedily distribute the values.
Place larger values from the back of the sorted heights in non-increasing order at the even indices.
Place smaller values from the front of the sorted heights in non-decreasing order at the odd indices.
